creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
crees       2012-05-07 15:06:45 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/condor      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist

                          patch-src-condor_utils-condor_config.cpp

  Log:
  - Update to 7.0.0
  - Rewrite dependencies
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:             ports/166733

  Approved by:    Andy Pavlo <pavlo@cs.brown.edu> (former maintainer)
